Home › Brevard County › Cape Canaveral › Top-Rated & Safe

Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Cape Canaveral

Clean kitchen, happy room — and these 9 Cape Canaveral restaurants pull off both at once. Every one clears an A health grade on top of strong diner ratings. SOUTHERN CHARM CAFE tops the room at 4.8 stars.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • A 100 S
    SOUTHERN CHARM CAFE Cafe ★ 4.8 (3452) Cape Canaveral · Brevard County VegKeto +2 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 92 T
    TWISTEE TREAT Other ★ 4.6 (1841) Cape Canaveral · Brevard County Inspected Dec 2025
  • A 100 H
    HOMEWOOD SUITES CAPE CANAVERAL COCOA BEACH Other ★ 4.6 (1256) Cape Canaveral · Brevard County Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 100 G
    2 GEORGES OCEANSIDE BAR & GRILL American ★ 4.6 (919) Cape Canaveral · Brevard County DFKeto +4 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 92 J
    JOANNE'S BEACHSIDE CAFE INC Cafe ★ 4.5 (964) Cape Canaveral · Brevard County Healthy Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 100 K
    KELSEYS PIZZA RESTAURANT AND PREACHER BAR Italian ★ 4.4 (1780) Cape Canaveral · Brevard County VegHealthy Inspected May 2026
  • A 90 R
    RESIDENCE INN CAPE CANAVERAL Other ★ 4.4 (1125) Cape Canaveral · Brevard County Inspected Oct 2025
  • A 99 W
    WENDY'S 8558 Other ★ 3.5 (1705) Cape Canaveral · Brevard County Keto Inspected May 2026
  • A 98 M
    MCDONALD'S 17816 Other ★ 3.4 (3170) Cape Canaveral · Brevard County Healthy Inspected Dec 2025
